reportGroups.name: Satış Sipariş Raporu
reportGroups.description: Açık siparişler, sevk durumu ve termin takibi

reports.name: Açık Sipariş Raporu
reports.description: Teslim edilmemiş siparişler, termin ve üretim durumu
reports.sql:
SELECT
  O.FICHENO AS 'Sipariş No',
  CONVERT(DATE, O.DATE_) AS 'Tarih',
  C.CODE AS 'Cari Kodu',
  C.DEFINITION_ AS 'Cari',
  CASE WHEN O.STATUS=4 THEN 'Sevkedilebilir' WHEN O.STATUS=1 THEN 'Öneri' END AS 'Sipariş Durumu',
  I.CODE AS 'Stok Kodu',
  CR.NAME AS 'Adı',
  CR.NAME2 AS 'Adı2',
  CR.NAME3 AS 'Adı3',
  OL.AMOUNT AS 'Miktar',
  OL.LINEEXP AS 'Satır Açıklaması',
  CONVERT(DATE, OL.DUEDATE) AS 'Termin Tarihi',
  DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), OL.DUEDATE) AS 'Termine Kalan Gün',
  ISNULL(SUM(P.RemaniningAmount), 0) AS 'Stok',
  CASE XT.SIPARISDURUM WHEN 1 THEN 'Planlama bekliyor' WHEN 2 THEN 'Üretim aşamasında' WHEN 3 THEN 'Sevke hazır' ELSE NULL END AS 'Üretim Durumu'
FROM LG_023_01_ORFLINE OL
LEFT JOIN LG_023_ITEMS I ON OL.STOCKREF=I.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_023_01_ORFICHE O ON OL.ORDFICHEREF=O.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_023_CLCARD C ON OL.CLIENTREF=C.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN CoralReef_Loj.DBO.Items CR ON I.CODE=CR.CODE
LEFT JOIN CoralReef_Loj.DBO.Package P ON P.StockCardID=CR.OID AND P.GCRecord IS NULL AND P.WarehouseID IN (5,3)
LEFT JOIN LG_XT501001_023 XT ON XT.PARLOGREF=O.LOGICALREF
WHERE OL.STATUS IN (1,4) AND OL.TRCODE=1 AND I.CODE IS NOT NULL
  AND OL.SHIPPEDAMOUNT < OL.AMOUNT
  AND O.DATE_ >= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,GETDATE())
  AND O.STATUS IN (1,4)
GROUP BY O.FICHENO,O.DATE_,C.CODE,C.DEFINITION_,O.STATUS,
  I.CODE,CR.NAME,CR.NAME2,CR.NAME3,OL.AMOUNT,OL.LINEEXP,OL.DUEDATE,XT.SIPARISDURUM
ORDER BY O.DATE_ DESC

reports.name: Sevk Raporu
reports.sql:
SELECT 
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), STL.DATE_, 104) AS 'Sevk Tarihi',
    STF.FICHENO AS 'İrsaliye No',
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ORF.DATE_, 104) AS 'Sipariş Tarihi',
    ORF.FICHENO AS 'Sipariş No',
    CLC.CODE AS 'Cari Kodu',
    CLC.DEFINITION_ AS 'Cari Hesap Adı',
    CLC.COUNTRY AS 'Ülke',
    CLC.CITY AS 'Şehir',
    CLC.SPECODE AS 'Meslek Grubu',
    ITM.CODE AS 'Malzeme Kodu',
    ITM.NAME AS 'Malzeme Adı 1',
    ITM.NAME3 AS 'Malzeme Adı 2',
    ITM.NAME4 AS 'Malzeme Adı 3',
    ITM2.OEMMODELNAME AS 'Model Adı',
    STL.AMOUNT AS 'Miktar',
    -- BUGÜN SEVK MİKTARI
    CASE 
        WHEN CAST(STL.DATE_ AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN STL.AMOUNT 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS 'Bugün Sevk',
    -- BU AY SEVK MİKTARI
    CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(STL.DATE_) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(STL.DATE_) = MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN STL.AMOUNT 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS 'Bu Ay Sevk',
    -- BUGÜN SEVK TUTARI
    CASE 
        WHEN CAST(STL.DATE_ AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 
            ROUND(CASE 
                WHEN STF.TRRATE = 0 THEN STL.PRPRICE * STL.AMOUNT
                ELSE STL.PRPRICE * STL.AMOUNT * STF.TRRATE 
            END, 2)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS 'Bugün Sevk Tutar',
    -- BU AY SEVK TUTARI
    CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(STL.DATE_) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(STL.DATE_) = MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN 
            ROUND(CASE 
                WHEN STF.TRRATE = 0 THEN STL.PRPRICE * STL.AMOUNT
                ELSE STL.PRPRICE * STL.AMOUNT * STF.TRRATE 
            END, 2)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS 'Bu Ay Sevk Tutar',
    ISNULL(CUR.CURCODE, 'TL') AS 'Döviz Cinsi',
    ROUND(STF.TRRATE, 2) AS 'Döviz Kuru',
    STL.PRPRICE AS 'KDV Hariç Fiyat',
    ROUND(CASE 
        WHEN STF.TRRATE = 0 THEN STL.PRPRICE 
        ELSE STL.PRPRICE * STF.TRRATE 
    END, 2) AS 'TL Cinsinden KDV Hariç Fiyat'
FROM LG_023_01_STLINE STL
INNER JOIN LG_023_01_STFICHE STF ON STL.STFICHEREF = STF.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_023_01_ORFLINE ORL ON STL.ORDTRANSREF = ORL.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN LG_023_01_ORFICHE ORF ON STL.ORDFICHEREF = ORF.LOGICALREF
INNER JOIN LG_023_CLCARD CLC ON STF.CLIENTREF = CLC.LOGICALREF
INNER JOIN LG_023_ITEMS ITM ON STL.STOCKREF = ITM.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN CoralReef_Loj.dbo.ITEMS ITM2 ON ITM.CODE = ITM2.CODE
LEFT JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON STF.TRCURR = CUR.CURTYPE
WHERE STL.DATE_ >= DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())
  AND STL.TRCODE IN (7, 8)
ORDER BY STL.DATE_ DESC

reports.name: as
reports.sql:

  O.FICHENO AS 'Sipariş No',
  CONVERT(DATE, O.DATE_) AS 'Tarih',
  C.CODE AS 'Cari Kodu',

LEFT JOIN CoralReef_Loj.DBO.Package P ON P.StockCardID=CR.OID AND P.GCRecord IS NULL AND P.WarehouseID IN (5,3)
